subcodes.first_line: Remember the mercy of thy Lord unto His servant Kazim, who believed in God and was among the triumphant ones, as recorded in the Mother Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر رحمه ربک عبده کاظم الذی آمن بالله و کان من الفائزین فی ام الالواح مسطورا و
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @soul; spirit after death, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
